5:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Ranking & Scoring"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"How Mnemosyne ranks and scores retrieval results across different search modes."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Scoring Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Diagram Error:"}]," ","document is not defined"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Individual Scorers"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Vector Score"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Cosine similarity between query embedding and memory embedding:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"vector_score = dot(query_vec, mem_vec) / (norm(query_vec) * norm(mem_vec))\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Range: 0.0 (unrelated) to 1.0 (identical)"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"FTS5 Score"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"BM25 relevance score normalized to 0–1:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"fts_score = bm25_score / max_bm25_score_in_results\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Temporal Score"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Recency bonus decaying exponentially:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"temporal_score = exp(-age_hours / half_life_hours)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Default half-life: 168 hours (7 days)"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Rank Fusion"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"final_score = (vector_score * w_v) + \n            (fts_score * w_t) + \n            (temporal_score * w_tm) +\n            (importance_bonus * w_i)\n\n# Bonus for high-importance memories\nimportance_bonus = memory.importance * 0.1\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Custom Scoring"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Override weights\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"deployment\",\n  vector_weight=0.4,\n  text_weight=0.4,\n  temporal_weight=0.1,\n  importance_weight=0.1,\n)\n\n# Custom scorer function\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"deployment\",\n  custom_scorer=my_scorer_fn,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Result Deduplication"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When the same memory appears in multiple result sets, Mnemosyne deduplicates and keeps the highest score:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Deduplication strategy\nseen_ids = set()\nfor result in all_results:\n  if result.id not in seen_ids:\n      seen_ids.add(result.id)\n      yield result\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Re-ranking"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For top-k results, Mnemosyne can apply a learned re-ranker:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Enable cross-encoder re-ranking\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"database choice\",\n  rerank=True,\n  rerank_model=\"cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Re-ranking improves precision at the cost of additional latency (~50ms per result)."}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Tuning Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Start with default weights and adjust based on your use case. If agents frequently miss exact facts, increase ",["$","code",null,{"children":"text_weight"}],". If they struggle with conceptual queries, increase ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vector_weight"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/1324ugbfcq7x6.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"GDtznscqTPuT1Y-yMCstU"}
